# SOURCE: Straight Line Persuasion (SLP)
> **Versao:** 1.0.0
> **Data:** 2026-03-18
> **Pessoa:** Jordan Belfort
> **Tipo:** COURSE (home-study program)
> **Arquivos:** 11 (9 videos + 2 PDFs)
> **Tamanho:** ~668KB de transcrições
> **ID:** SLP

---

## VISAO GERAL

Straight Line Persuasion é o programa original de home-study de Jordan Belfort — a versão clássica e mais crua do seu sistema de vendas, anterior à Straight Line Certification 4.0 (SLSC4). Enquanto o SLSC4 é o curso de certificação moderno e refinado, o SLP é a versão original com ensino mais emotivo, mais stories, e mais NLP.

## MODULOS

| # | Módulo | Arquivo | Bytes | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|---------|-------|------------------|
| 01 | 3 Tenets of SLP | transcription_avi_01 | 57KB | Os 3 pilares do sistema, identidade do vendedor, bullshit story |
| 02 | Art of Prospecting: 5 Keys | transcription_mp4_02 | 40KB | Gold Prospector Model, 4 buyer categories, sales funnel reverse-engineering |
| 03 | Mastering Tonality | transcription_avi_03 | 68KB | 29 tonal patterns, micro-agreement chaining, word grouping, physiological triggers |
| 04 | Being A Visionary | transcription_avi_04 | 51KB | Vision vs goals, McDonald's system, body language, 72% eye contact rule |
| 05 | Inner Game of Sales | transcription_mp4_05 | 44KB | NLP, RAS, fear management, pattern interruption, delete-distort-generalize |
| 06 | The SLP System | transcription_avi_06 | 61KB | Master formula, qualification transition, the straight line mechanics |
| 08 | Power of Three 10s | transcription_avi_08 | 92KB | Combination Lock Model, Boxing In Framework, trial close methodology |
| 09 | Power of Language | transcription_mp4_09 | 27KB | 5 trigger words, offsetting patterns, Cialdini experiments, future pacing |
| 10 | Person of Influence | transcription_mp4_10 | 31KB | Customers for life, pain-pleasure anchoring, ducking calls kills deals |
| -- | Flash Cards | transcription_pdf | 15KB | Condensed principles, 5 personal obstacles, 3 ways to overcome buying wounds |
| -- | SLP Action Book | transcription_pdf | 182KB | Comprehensive workbook, all modules codified, exercises |

## RELACAO COM OUTRAS FONTES

| Fonte | Relação |
|-------|---------|
| SLSC4 | SLP é o PRECURSOR. SLSC4 refinou e expandiu o sistema. SLP tem mais stories e emoção. |
| SLM | Complementar. SLM é marketing digital, SLP é vendas presenciais/telefone puro. |

## CONTRIBUICAO UNICA DO SLP

- **29 Tonal Patterns** (SLSC4 simplificou para 10)
- **Gold Prospector Model** + 4 buyer archetypes quantificados (30/30/30/10)
- **Sales Funnel Reverse Engineering** (dials → connects → appointments → pitches → sales)
- **Trigger Words Science** (Cialdini experiments, waitress tip study)
- **Offsetting Language Patterns** (5 specific fear-offsetting phrases)
- **Inner Game NLP depth** (RAS, delete-distort-generalize, baby-connection generalization)
- **Body Language specifics** (gender proxemics, handshake science, 72% eye contact, pinky ring data)
- **Customer for Life Framework** (5 specific tactics)
- **Vision Quest Goal-Setting** (dissociated-associated technique)
